text.title: nodejs-express-fastify Failure Modes
text.summary: Four antipatterns each with symptom / root-cause / fix.

antipattern.symptom: Errors thrown in routes never invoke the handler; client sees default Express 500.
antipattern.root-cause: Order-dependent middleware; 4-arg handler only catches downstream next(err).
antipattern.fix: Move app.use(errorHandler) to AFTER all app.use(routes...).

antipattern.symptom: Latency 10x baseline under load; CPU profiler shows ZOD/TypeBox compile time.
antipattern.root-cause: Schema parsed/compiled inside the handler closure.
antipattern.fix: Move schemas to module scope; pass compiled schema into the handler.

antipattern.symptom: Inconsistent error shapes across endpoints; ErrorMapper bypassed.
antipattern.root-cause: Handlers writing responses directly instead of throwing/calling next(err).
antipattern.fix: Throw a typed AppError; let centralized error handler emit Problem+JSON.

antipattern.description: No SIGTERM listener; container kill drops in-flight requests.
antipattern.symptom: Rolling deploys cause 502s for ~30s while pods cycle.
antipattern.root-cause: Default process.exit on SIGTERM without server.close().
antipattern.fix: Add SIGTERM+SIGINT handlers calling server.close + DB pool close + setTimeout fallback.
